name: Superheavy Samurai Commander Shanawo
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>超</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>重</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>将</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>シャナ－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｏ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>オー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
When an opponent's monster declares an attack: You can Special Summon this card, then if you have no Spells/Traps in your GY, change that opponent's monster's ATK to 0, also negate its effects. You can only use this effect of "Superheavy Samurai Commander Shanawo" once per turn.

[ Monster Effect ] 
1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner monsters
This card can attack while in face-up Defense Position. If it does, apply its DEF for damage calculation. Once per turn, during the Battle Phase, if you control this Synchro Summoned card (Quick Effect): You can Special Summon 1 "Superheavy Samurai" Monster Card from your GY or face-up Spell & Trap Zone, then you can place this card in your Pendulum Zone.
pend_eff: When an opponent's monster declares an attack: You can Special Summon this card, then if you have no Spells/Traps in your GY, change that opponent's monster's ATK to 0, also negate its effects. You can only use this effect of "Superheavy Samurai Commander Shanawo" once per turn.

mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Pendulum Zone
Does not require specific Synchro Materials
Special Summons from your Spell & Trap Zone
misc: Requires having no Spells in Graveyard
Requires having no Traps in Graveyard
